TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ilham_Aliyev, title = Ilham_Aliyev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ilham_Aliyev} }

S.FORM: == Ilham Aliyev == ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 12, Ilham Aliyev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Azerbaijan ta' misuw hya' ga Ilham Aliyev, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2003 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Ilham Aliyev == ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 12, Ilham Aliyev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Azerbaijan ta' misuw hya' ga Ilham Aliyev, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2003 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ilħam alije* == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ilħam alije*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw azerβaijan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ilħam alije*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
